summary: Completed E2E frontend verification of 3 user-facing flows: (1) History dialog - file versions, diff comparison, restore; (2) Multi-agent mode - 3-phase orchestration with planner/coder/reviewer; (3) Invite + notification bell flow. All 3 flows passed successfully.
seed_data_creation: Created owner user, invitee user, sessions, and test project via mongosh. Created 3 file versions for history testing via PUT /api/projects/{id}/files.
context_for_next_testing_agent: E2E verification of 3 flows complete: (1) History dialog works - opens via [data-testid=history-btn], shows file paths in [data-testid=history-paths], versions with As A/As B comparison, unified diff with red/green lines, restore creates new version with source='restore'. (2) Multi-agent mode works - [data-testid=mode-multi] pill activates 3-phase orchestration, placeholder shows 'Planner → Coder → Reviewer', streaming shows phase markers '### ▸ planner/coder/reviewer phase', mode badge [data-testid=mode-badge-multi] visible on assistant message, credits deducted by 3. (3) Invite + notification works - Share dialog [data-testid=share-dialog] opens, invite via email creates notification for invitee, [data-testid=notifications-badge] shows unread count, [data-testid=notifications-panel] shows invite with project name, clicking notification navigates to project and marks as read.

steps_verified: History button [data-testid=history-btn] visible and clickable
History dialog [data-testid=history-dialog] opens
File paths shown in [data-testid=history-paths]
Clicking path shows versions list with timestamps and user info
Unified diff pane [data-testid=history-diff] shows red/green lines
As A / As B buttons work for version comparison
Restore button creates new version with source='restore'
Toast notification 'File restored' appears
Multi mode pill [data-testid=mode-multi] visible and clickable
Placeholder shows 'Planner → Coder → Reviewer will each take a pass (3 credits)'
Streaming response shows '### ▸ planner phase' marker
Streaming response shows '### ▸ coder phase' marker
Streaming response shows '### ▸ reviewer phase' marker
Mode badge [data-testid=mode-badge-multi] visible on assistant message
Credits decremented by 3 (100 → 97)
Code generated (HelloWorld.jsx, App.js)
Share button [data-testid=share-btn] visible and clickable
Share dialog [data-testid=share-dialog] opens
Invite email input [data-testid=invite-email-input] works
Invite button [data-testid=invite-btn] sends invite
Toast 'Invited invitee.verify@forge.dev as editor' appears
Invitee added to collaborators list
Invitee sees notification badge [data-testid=notifications-badge] with count '1'
Notification panel [data-testid=notifications-panel] shows invite notification
Notification shows 'INVITE' kind and project name
Clicking notification navigates to project page
Badge disappears after clicking (notification marked as read)

mocked_apis.none: No mocking - all LLM calls are real via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
